entity.summary: Decentralized exchange protocol derived from the Solidly-style perpetual liquidity model, operating across Fantom/Sonic and related Base deployment surfaces with swaps, liquidity pools, gauge voting, and incentives.
entity.notes: HEI models Equalizer source rows for Fantom, Sonic, and Base-related deployments as one entity. Official documentation records the Fantom-to-Sonic migration path, separate Fantom and Sonic branches after migration, and the broader Equalizer product documentation including SCALE on Base.

evidence.title: Welcome to Equalizer
evidence.notes: First-party documentation describes Equalizer as a decentralized exchange using a Solidly-style perpetual liquidity model and documents pools, gauges, fees, listings, and trading functions.

evidence.title: Equalizer migration to Sonic Chain
evidence.notes: First-party migration documentation explains the December 2024 Fantom-to-Sonic migration process and states that Equalizer would operate independent Fantom and Sonic branches after migration.

evidence.title: Equalizer official website
evidence.notes: Current first-party domain remains available and is linked from current Equalizer documentation.
